news.title: Anthropic says Claude Code subscribers will need to pay extra for OpenClaw usage
news.summary: It’s about to become more expensive for Claude Code subscribers to use Anthropic’s coding assistant with OpenClaw and other third-party tools.

news.title: After fighting malware for decades, this cybersecurity veteran is now hacking drones
news.summary: Mikko Hyppönen is one of the most recognizable faces of the cybersecurity industry. After fighting computer viruses, worms, and malware, for more than 35 years, he tells TechCrunch why he is now working on systems to stop killer drones.

news.title: Anthropic is having a moment in the private markets; SpaceX could spoil the party
news.summary: Glen Anderson, president of Rainmaker Securities, says the secondary market for private shares has never been more active — with Anthropic the hottest trade around, OpenAI losing ground, and SpaceX's looming IPO poised to reshape the landscape for everyone.
